allow: PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\grzch\\SourceCodes\\Spinajs\\main"; $packages = Get-ChildItem packages -Directory | Where-Object { Test-Path "$\($_.FullName\)\\tsconfig.mjs.json" } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name; $errors = @\(\); foreach \($pkg in $packages\) { $result = npx tsc -p "packages/$pkg/tsconfig.mjs.json" --noEmit 2>&1; if \($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0\) { $firstLine = \($result | Select-Object -First 1\); $errors += "$pkg`: $firstLine" } }; Write-Output "Packages with errors:"; $errors | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_ })
